He has been practically inseparable from Wakaba since their birth on the same day in the same hospital. name: Master Chief
description: Master Chief Petty Officer of the UNSC Navy, John-117 is a SPARTAN-II Commando of the UNSC Naval Special Warfare Command. John was taken away from his homeworld Eridanus II and trained to become a Spartan from the age of six. He and 32 other recruits passed SPARTAN-II program. In the process he was augmented mechanically and biologically. His augmentations include: - Ceramic grafting onto bones, making them virtually unbreakable. - Muscular Enhancement. - Increased Human growth. - Visual Enhance

name: Roddy
description: Roddy is a freelance AI programmer and system engineer from Mars. He likes collecting robot figurines, watching Star Trek and mecha anime, and listening to cheesy Vocaloid songs from the old days.

name: Convoy
description: The leader Cybertrons (Autobots). A wise, father-like leader whose unmatched bravery and compassion serve to inspire his robot and human allies alike and strike fear into the hearts of his enemies, the Destron (Decepticons). His signature weapon is the **Laser Rifle** (レーザーライフル ), also known as the **Ion Blaster** in the US. Fio is very talented and skilled for her age, and most importantly, passionate about her work. She greatly admires Porco Rosso. Her father was once a member of Captain Marco Paggot’s unit in the Italian Air Force, and she heard wonderful stories about him. name: Futaba Kuze
description: An impossibly naive girl who fell for Touma. She ends up befriending Ichinose in an attempt to learn more about him, but they end up becoming close friends with each other and Touma as well. She is very sweet and tries her hardest, but her natural clumsiness and naivete make it hard for her to befriends others in her class.

name: Hanami

name: Liz Cather
description: The original protagonist of the game. She is a commoner and the only daughter of a baker. Despite being a commoner, she is able to use all the different types of magic. She is very kind and prefers to avoid conflict. However, she is also very naive and idealistic, though no one dares challenge her thinking. She is quite charismatic and wildly popular, as many noble boys are constantly falling in love with her.

description: Parco Folgore is a superstar and film hero from Milan, Italy. He normally spends his time touring the world, giving concerts, and meeting his fans - especially the ladies, who love him. However, he and Kanchomé have come to Japan for a special purpose - to defeat Zatch Bell and Kiyo Takamine. They are defeated rather easily and leave, but Zatch and Kiyo meet them again in England, where Kiyo discovers Folgore singing for a group of sick children in the hospital. name: Ruki Makino
description: Ruki is the type of person who, in the beginning, sees Digimon as nothing more than mere computer data. She aspires for her partner, Renamon, to become the strongest Digimon ever. Eventually, she realizes that the two must be on equal partnership and friendship. She is a bit bitter and slightly antisocial thanks to her parents' divorce, but Takato, Jenrya and Renamon, manage to bring out the best in her, by showing her (among other things) that friendship is priceless.
